brand_identity.emotional_tone: Deeply emotional, luxurious, cinematic, editorial, transformational.
brand_identity.visual_mood: Deep charcoal/black, warm white, muted gold accents, soft feminine tones, film grain texture.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Mobile-first full width, expanding to bento or overlapping grids on desktop. Use generous negative space.

hero_background.description: Cinematic dark background with floating golden dust particles for hero section.

gold_foil.description: Gold foil texture used for boarding pass accents and premium details.

photo_placeholders.description: Cinematic travel placeholder 1 (use as one of the 9 photos).
Cinematic travel placeholder 2 (use as one of the 9 photos).

styling_rules.image_filters: Apply CSS film grain overlay. Filter: contrast(1.1) brightness(0.9) grayscale(15%) sepia(10%).
styling_rules.image_border_radius: rounded-none or subtle rounded-sm for an editorial print feel.

password_gate.design: Fullscreen dark. Centered input field with minimal bottom border, no background. Large elegant placeholder text.

hero_section.design: Fullscreen 100vh. Dark cinematic background overlay. Large editorial serif typography staggering in. '16' in massive font size.

photo_timeline.design: Vertical scrolling timeline. 9 photos total (use placeholders, alternate layouts left/right). Images must have CSS film grain and cinematic filter. Small narrative captions.

philosophy_section.design: World map or dark abstract background. Glowing accent points. Text emphasizing 'Traveling the world will open your soul'.

boarding_pass_reveal.design: Premium digital boarding pass. 'Zelikman Airlines'. First Class. Destination: Unknown. Use gold foil texture background clipping or gold text on black card. Perforated edges or dashed borders. Monospace font for flight details.

audio_player.design: Floating bottom right or left. Minimalist icon (vinyl record spinning or simple waves). Play/pause toggle.

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Implement smooth scrolling (Lenis) for premium momentum feel.
motion_and_interactions.reveals: Use Framer Motion for staggered fade-ups and subtle parallax on images.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements should shift text color to gold (#D4AF37) and glow slightly.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion extensively for cinematic reveals. Nothing should appear abruptly.
The timeline must accommodate 9 images. Create a reusable <TimelinePhoto /> component with the CSS film grain filter built-in.
Implement the CSS film grain using a pseudo-element with a repeating radial gradient or SVG noise filter overlaying the image wrapper.
The boarding pass should feel like a tangible, high-end ticket. Use borders, uppercase monospace fonts for details, and golden accents.
Ensure all fonts are loaded from Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Outfit, Space Mono).
Install lucide-react for minimal icons (audio toggle, arrows).
